api/src/main/java/ch/chalender/api/ApiAp.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support to allow @Scheduled annotations to function.
Extend SpringBootServletInitializer to support WAR deployment in external servlet containers.
Implement the configure method to properly initialize the application context for WAR deployments.
Register a ModelMapper bean to enable object mapping functionality within the application context.
api/src/main/java/ch/chalender/api/ApiAp.human_impl: @Bean public ModelMapper modelMapper() { return new ModelMapper(); }

api/src/main/java/ch/chalender/api/ApiAp.general_idea: Explicitly define the base package for component scanning to ensure correct component discovery.

api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add OAuth2 client starter to support external identity providers.
Add OAuth2 resource server starter to secure API endpoints.
Add Spring Security starter to enable security configuration.
Add validation starter to support Bean Validation annotations.
Add mail starter to support sending emails.
Add Thymeleaf starter to support HTML email templates.
Add JJWT library for handling JSON Web Tokens.
Add JAXB API to support XML binding operations.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter to generate API documentation.
Add Spring Security Test for testing secured endpoints.
Add Spring Boot DevTools for faster development cycles.
Add configuration processor for metadata generation.
Add ModelMapper for object mapping utilities.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter integration for integration tests.
Add Testcontainers MongoDB module for database testing.
Add Apache Commons IO for file and stream utilities.
Add iCal4j library for generating iCalendar files.
Add Spring Batch starter for batch processing tasks.
Add Spring Data JPA starter for relational data access.
Add H2 database for in-memory relational data storage.
Add Apache Tika core for content analysis.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV file processing.

.idea/.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore GitHub Copilot chat session files in the IDE configuration directory.

.idea/compiler.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the bytecode target level to Java 17 for the api module in the IDE compiler configuration.
Add the -parameters compiler option for the chalender-api module to ensure parameter names are available at runtime.

.idea/misc.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA project configuration to target JDK 21 instead of JDK 17.
.idea/misc.xml.human_impl: Changed languageLevel to JDK_21_PREVIEW and project-jdk-name to corretto-21 in .idea/misc.xml
